AB Variation:

Milwaukee Events

Visit Milwaukee's calendar of events is the No. 1 source for things to do in Milwaukee. Whether you’re planning your next vacation or looking for something to do this weekend, there's an event here for everyone.

Want to have your event listed on our calendar? Submit it here!

Find your perfect stay

Spring

After a cold winter, spring is when the city starts to thaw! The weather can still be unpredictable through the spring months, but that doesn’t stop Milwaukeeans from getting out to…

Family-Friendly

Spend less of your family vacation waiting for the fun to start and more of it making memories. With many of Milwaukee’s best family-friendly attractions located downtown or just a…

Free Events

Looking for an exciting time in Milwaukee without breaking the bank? Look no further! From exploring the scenic parks along Lake Michigan's shoreline to delving into the city's…

Local Music Scene

Many know the Violent Femmes call Milwaukee home, but this city continues to produce some amazing musical talent. To be able to say that you saw them before they were famous, check out…

Attractions

Explore Milwaukee's top attractions, including museums, parks, the county zoo and Discovery World.

Museums

Milwaukee Natural History and Culture Museums. Make your trip to Milwaukee educational and fun with stops at these popular local museums. Experience interactive exhibits, touch live butterflies, and step back into the past and forward into…

Your Milwaukee Adventure Awaits!

Discover, plan and explore with our interactive digital map! Find top spots, events and hidden gems—navigate Milwaukee like a pro and make every moment unforgettable!
